image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about the open science movement.
Context visual: The open science movement aims to make research accessible to everyone.
Escalation visual: Imagine sharing your findings with the world, free from paywalls.
Evidence visual: Studies show that open science boosts collaboration and innovation!
Pattern Interrupt visual: But not all research is ready for public eyes; some is still preliminary.
Payoff visual: The movement could redefine how we view knowledge—open for all.
Cta visual: Curious about how this affects you? Follow for more insights!
